label: news_balanced
expression: news = vec_avg(nws12_afterhsz_sl); signal = ts_sum(news, 20); rank(signal) > 0.5 ? rank(signal) : -rank(ts_delta(close, 1))

label: news_group_cond
expression: news = ts_backfill(vec_avg(nws12_afterhsz_sl), 5); signal = group_zscore(ts_sum(news, 20), subindustry); signal > 0 ? 1 : -rank(ts_delta(close, 1))
